gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T.label = '+' THEN T.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T.label = '-' THEN T.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS diff_car_notcar FROM molecule t
pred_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN label = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS diff_car_notcar FROM molecule;
question: What is the difference between the number of molecules that are carcinogenic and those that are not?
